text: Which of the following conditions is considered an immediate slip, trip, or safety hazard on board?

options.text: Water accumulated on an internal staircase
An unsecured load suspended high on a crane hook
Both A and B are correct

explanation: Accumulated water and unsecured heavy loads are immediate physical hazards. Slippery surfaces cause falls, while suspended loads pose a risk of crushing injuries, both of which are common triggers for maritime accidents.
